title: regelia johannis
intro: Regelia johannis, also known as Firewheel Bush or Johannis Regelia, is a flowering shrub native to eastern Australia. Traditionally, Regelia johannis has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been observed to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Regelia johannis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic, promoting urinary tract health. In herbal preparations, Regelia johannis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
